asia.title: Serbia’s President Vucic says he’ll resign within weeks, amid student protests
asia.summary: Serbia’s populist President Aleksandar Vucic said on Saturday that he would resign his post within weeks, paving the way for early elections following youth-led protests that shook his tight grip on power. Vucic did not specify exactly when he would resign or when an election, either for parliament or for a new president, could be held.
